entities.name: build_plan
entities.context: Function that builds a deduplication plan for workout observations

entities.name: apply_plan
entities.context: Function that executes a deduplication plan, removing duplicate observations and orphan workouts

entities.name: workout_observations
entities.context: Database table storing workout observation records with source and external_id fields

entities.name: workouts
entities.context: Database table storing workout records, checked for orphans during deduplication

entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: External fitness data source identified by source='fitbit' in workout observations

entities.name: DuplicateGroup
entities.context: Data structure grouping canonical and duplicate observation IDs with workouts eligible for deletion

entities.name: deduplication_pipeline
entities.context: Two-phase pipeline: build_plan identifies duplicates, apply_plan removes them from the database

relationships.context: First phase of the deduplication pipeline that identifies duplicate observations and orphan workouts
Second phase that executes deletions planned by build_plan
Fitbit is a source for workout observations, identified by source field and external_id
build_plan produces DuplicateGroups containing canonical, duplicate_obs_ids, and workouts_to_delete
apply_plan deletes duplicate rows from workout_observations table
apply_plan removes orphan workout records after observation deduplication
